raw_text: profile consider myselfan organized person and with a great motivation, l am able to adapt to any circumstance and always give the best of me in any project, at the same time that strive to work as a team and promote values like fellowship. skills advanced level of knowledge: word, excel, powerpoint mid level of knowledge: photoshop, illustrator knowledge of 3d design: autocad, solidworks programing tools: android studio, keil, matlab, intellij, tia portal, labview, maxima, robotstudio, visualcomponents 4.0, simulink, kofax kapow, uipath, blueprism beginner in databases: sql, orade languages spanish english english level: c1 (advanced) last english certificate: first certificate (fce) (b2) by cambridge university alejandro gutierrez sanjurjo 15/02/1993 calle los curas 68 4c, torrejón de ardoz, 28850, madrid tel: 600798164 / 916772247 e-mail: alejandro150293@gmail.com www.linkedin.com/in/alejandro-gutiérrez-sanjurjo-967a7b162 minsait (indra) inside the department of advanced technologies, in the division of robotic automation of processes. among the tasks that carry out in my day to day, would highlight: e = the functional definition with the client of the processes to be automated. e definition of environments with process automation tools: uipath, kofax kapow, 3/ueprism e = maintenance of the robots in production e = the development of enhancements in the robots in order to improve its functionality and reliability verallia spain, s.a. (saint-gobain vicasa, sa). development and monitoring the industrial excellence system (verallia industrial model), through the implementation of tools to improve the control of production processes. design and implementation of opl's, sop's, elaboration of procedures standards, protocols, etc. monitoring of process indicators (kpi's and kai's) for the detection of deviations to act in real time. cooperation in the progress in the 5s program of the plant. long xiang importacion exportacion, s.l. (visiotech) during my internships, made laboratory tests and technical requirements, to see the potential of the new cctv products. also, was in charge of the verification of technical specifications for quality control in security and cctv devices. msc degree industrial engineering (2018) tampere university of technology (finland) msc degree industrial engineering (2016-2018) universidad politécnica de alcalá de henares (spain) bachelor's degree industrial electronics and automatic engineering (2011 2016) universidad politécnica de alcalá de henares (spain)
